positive: A stylized, symmetrical vector illustration of a meditating fox sitting atop a minimalist mountain peak at sunrise. The fox should have flowing, stylized fur and a serene expression. The scene features stylized, geometric clouds and a circular sun disc that casts warm, vibrant gradients of orange, deep gold, and pastel pink across the landscape. The composition must be clean, high-contrast, and suitable for screen printing on apparel, emphasizing strong silhouettes and flat design elements. Art Deco and modern Japanese Ukiyo-e influences, line art detailing, highly graphic, symmetrical, vector quality, minimalist pop art style.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noisy, lowres, text, logo, watermark, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, grayscale, realistic photography, photorealism, jpeg artifacts
